description_long: This is a classic football with a spherical shape, featuring a traditional black and white pattern composed of pentagonal and hexagonal panels. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with sharp, clean edges between the panels, indicating minimal wear. The black pentagons are evenly distributed among the white hexagons, creating a visually balanced and iconic design. The seams between the panels are visible, suggesting a stitched or bonded construction typical of standard footballs. The object is likely inflated with air, giving it a firm yet slightly compressible feel. There are no visible logos or league markings, and the ball appears to be in excellent, almost new condition.
description: A classic black and white football with a smooth, glossy surface and a traditional panel pattern, appearing new and well-maintained.
description_view_0: Front view showing a centered black pentagonal panel surrounded by white hexagons and additional black pentagons.
description_view_1: Rotated view revealing more of the side panels and a subtle logo or marking on one black pentagon.
description_view_2: Opposite face with a similar arrangement of black and white panels, emphasizing the geometric symmetry.
description_view_3: Another angled view highlighting the alternating black pentagons and white hexagons, with no visible branding.
